title: SPARTA Portfolio Capital-Efficiency Metric Spec v1
research_objective: Pin the EXACT formula, required inputs, units, range, and validation rules for each Portfolio Capital-Efficiency metric defined (definition-only) in the P0 protocol, plus the schema of the future advisory report. This bundle is spec/framework-only: it defines HOW each metric WOULD be computed from FROZEN admissible inputs (per the P1 Input Contract); it computes NO metric and produces NO real portfolio result. Computation is a separate, separately-authorized bundle.

verdict_ceiling_rules.rationale: Downstream, advisory metrics inherit the upstream registries' WATCH ceiling and must never imply readiness not earned.

c10_boundary.note: This spec does not read, connect to, or depend on Candidate #10 indicator results. C10 remains deferred until it has its own FROZEN, committed replay artifact; only then does it become an ordinary admissible input under the P1 rules. Never the working tree.

shared_symbols.w_i: Proposed research weight of candidate i (advisory, never an execution size). 0 <= w_i, sum_i w_i = 1 within a portfolio set.
shared_symbols.sigma_i: standalone_risk of candidate i, taken from its FROZEN per-strategy report (P1 field standalone_risk).
shared_symbols.rho_ij: Pairwise correlation estimate between candidates i and j, supplied by the P4 Overlap/Correlation Method (NOT estimated in this bundle).
shared_symbols.sigma_p: Portfolio standalone-risk aggregate: sigma_p = sqrt( sum_i sum_j w_i * w_j * rho_ij * sigma_i * sigma_j ).
shared_symbols.e_i: frozen_cost_aware_expectancy of candidate i, taken from its FROZEN per-strategy report (P1 field frozen_cost_aware_expectancy).
shared_symbols.B: Pre-declared total research capital-at-risk envelope (operator scalar constant; never inferred from data).
shared_symbols.L: Pre-declared concentration cap (operator scalar constant in (0, 1]; never inferred from data).

metrics.label: Capital-at-risk budget utilisation
metrics.formula: car_i = w_i * sigma_i ; utilisation = ( sum_i car_i ) / B ; CONSTRAINT: sum_i car_i <= B.
metrics.units: fraction of the pre-declared budget B (dimensionless, 0..1+ where >1 means the budget is breached).
metrics.range: [0, +inf); a future advisory allocation is FAIL if utilisation > 1 (budget breached).
validation_rules: B must be operator-declared and strictly positive; never inferred from data.
If B is missing or <= 0, the metric is UNDEFINED and flagged, never defaulted.
sigma_i must come from a FROZEN admissible report (P1 standalone_risk).

metrics.label: Pairwise candidate overlap / redundancy
metrics.formula: For dimensions D in {asset, regime, direction} with sets A_i^D drawn from P1 exposure fields, jaccard_D(i,j) = |A_i^D ∩ A_j^D| / |A_i^D ∪ A_j^D| ; overlap(i,j) = ( w_asset*jaccard_asset + w_regime*jaccard_regime + w_dir*jaccard_dir ) / ( w_asset + w_regime + w_dir ). Dimension weights w_asset/w_regime/w_dir are pre-declared operator constants.
metrics.units: dimensionless similarity in [0, 1] (1 = fully redundant exposure).
validation_rules: Dimension weights are pre-declared constants; never fit to data.
If a union |A_i^D ∪ A_j^D| is empty for a dimension, that dimension's jaccard is UNDEFINED and EXCLUDED from the weighted average (never treated as 0 or 1).
Exposure sets come from FROZEN admissible reports (P1 asset/regime/direction fields).

metrics.label: Diversification ratio
metrics.formula: DR = ( sum_i w_i * sigma_i ) / sigma_p , where sigma_p = sqrt( sum_i sum_j w_i * w_j * rho_ij * sigma_i * sigma_j ).
metrics.range: [1, +inf); higher = capital spread across less-correlated edges.
validation_rules: rho_ij is supplied by the P4 Overlap/Correlation Method; this spec does NOT estimate correlations.
If sigma_p == 0 (degenerate), DR is UNDEFINED and flagged, never set to +inf.
sigma_i must come from FROZEN admissible reports.

metrics.label: Concentration limit / breach check
metrics.formula: For each grouping G in {candidate, asset, family}: share_g = ( sum_{k in g} w_k ) / ( sum_all w ) ; BREACH if any share_g > L.
metrics.units: fraction in [0, 1] per grouping; compared against the pre-declared cap L.
metrics.range: [0, 1]; a future advisory allocation is FAIL if any grouping's share > L.
validation_rules: L is operator-declared in (0, 1]; never inferred from data.
Per-asset / per-family aggregation uses the FROZEN asset_exposure field; an unmapped candidate is flagged, never silently grouped.
A breach is FAIL, not a down-weight signal.

metrics.label: Marginal capital efficiency (ranking only)
metrics.formula: mrc_i = ( w_i * sum_j w_j * rho_ij * sigma_i * sigma_j ) / sigma_p  (marginal risk contribution of candidate i) ; MCE_i = e_i / mrc_i.
metrics.units: after-cost expectancy per unit of marginal portfolio risk (dimensionless ratio used for RANKING only).
metrics.range: real-valued; used ONLY to rank candidates for human review.
validation_rules: RANKING ONLY: MCE is never converted into an auto-sizing or execution instruction.
If mrc_i == 0, MCE_i is UNDEFINED and flagged, never set to +inf.
e_i must come from a FROZEN admissible report; a candidate whose report surfaces a bypassed PASS/ACTIVE/STRONG verdict is inadmissible.

input_field_dependencies.note: All non-operator, non-P4 inputs are FROZEN admissible fields defined in the P1 Input Contract (required_fields_per_input). Operator-prefixed inputs are pre-declared scalar constants. P4-prefixed inputs come from the future Overlap/Correlation Method bundle.

metric_validation_rules.frozen_admissible_inputs_only: Every metric input (other than operator-declared constants) must be a FROZEN admissible field per the P1 Input Contract; live, networked, or uncommitted inputs are inadmissible.
metric_validation_rules.no_lookahead: No metric may use information not available at the decision time of the underlying frozen report.
metric_validation_rules.reproducibility: Same frozen inputs + same pre-declared constants reproduce the same metric value bit-for-bit on a second offline run.
metric_validation_rules.units_declared_per_metric: Each metric declares its units + range; no unitless magic numbers.
metric_validation_rules.pre_declared_constants_never_fit: B, L, and the overlap dimension weights are operator-declared constants and are NEVER fit, tuned, or inferred from data.
metric_validation_rules.undefined_over_silent_default: Any division-by-zero or empty-set case yields an explicit UNDEFINED+flag, never a silent 0 / 1 / +inf.
metric_validation_rules.marginal_efficiency_ranking_only: marginal_capital_efficiency is a ranking aid for human review only; it is never converted into an auto-sizing or execution instruction.
metric_validation_rules.verdict_ceiling_inherited: Every metric output carries the WATCH ceiling; PASS/ACTIVE/STRONG are never surfaced.
metric_validation_rules.no_real_result_in_this_bundle: This bundle computes NO metric and emits NO real portfolio result; it is spec-only.

advisory_report_schema.note: Schema of the FUTURE advisory report (shaped in P5, produced only under a separate compute authorization). Defined here so metric outputs have a fixed home. NOT produced in this bundle.

pass_watch_fail_rules.PASS: A future metric computation is PASS-grade FOR REVIEW only when: every input is FROZEN + admissible (P1); all pre-declared constants are operator-supplied; every metric respects its units/range + UNDEFINED handling; marginal_capital_efficiency is used for ranking only; outputs respect the WATCH ceiling; and the run reproduces bit-for-bit. PASS means 'metrics fit for human review', never 'allocate' or 'execute'.
pass_watch_fail_rules.WATCH: Metrics computable but at least one is borderline (sparse correlation coverage from P4, thin candidate set, a flagged UNDEFINED case the operator accepts); documented and re-checked.
pass_watch_fail_rules.FAIL: Any input is inadmissible/unfrozen; a pre-declared constant was fit to data; a division-by-zero was silently defaulted; marginal efficiency was used to auto-size; a budget/concentration breach was ignored; or the WATCH ceiling was bypassed.

required_future_artifacts: Portfolio Capital-Efficiency Allocation Baseline Spec v1 (P3) -- reference models (equal-weight / inverse-vol / capped-weight) + concentration cap; spec only.
Portfolio Capital-Efficiency Overlap/Correlation Method v1 (P4) -- supplies rho_ij used by diversification_ratio + marginal_capital_efficiency; spec only.
Portfolio Capital-Efficiency Advisory Memo Schema v1 (P5) -- finalises the advisory_report_schema; spec only.
A separately-authorized COMPUTE bundle that actually runs these formulas over frozen admissible inputs and emits an advisory report.
Lane closeout memo if the capital-efficiency idea PARKs / RETIREs.
safety_boundaries: Research-only. Advisory-only. Metric spec / framework only.
No broker control, no exchange connection, no API keys, no .env, no credential handling.
No live trading. No live capital allocation. No paper-order execution. No order placement. No order sizing for execution.
No scheduler / background daemon. No external network calls in this spec's runtime.
No metric computed in this bundle. No real portfolio result produced. No data fetch, no detector, no replay, no backtest.
Do not modify paper / live execution files. Do not read Candidate #10 working-tree files, tests, labels, replay, or detector.
Candidate #10 remains deferred and is not connected by this spec; C10 must finish and freeze by itself first.
Consume only FROZEN, committed, admissible artifacts; never live positions or uncommitted working trees.
Do not claim profitability. Do not claim live-readiness. Do not claim STRONG evidence from this spec alone.
A capital-efficiency score does not imply future returns. An advisory allocation is not an execution instruction. No allocation is authorized by this spec alone.
no_profit_claim_policy: This spec does not imply edge and does not allocate capital.
A defined formula does not imply profit.
A capital-efficiency score does not imply future returns.
An advisory allocation memo is a human-review aid, never an execution instruction.
No allocation is authorized by this spec alone (a separate compute bundle requires its own authorization).
